task_completion.description: Four entities (BOOK, AUTHOR, MEMBER, LOAN) are created and clearly labeled in draw.io.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io canvas shows four distinct entity shapes (such as tables or boxes) with the headers or labels: BOOK, AUTHOR, MEMBER, and LOAN.

task_completion.description: BOOK and AUTHOR entities contain at least two attributes each.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BOOK entity shape displays at least two of its required attributes (book_id, title, isbn). The AUTHOR entity shape displays at least two of its required attributes (author_id, name).

task_completion.description: MEMBER and LOAN entities contain at least two attributes each.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The MEMBER entity shape displays at least two of its required attributes (member_id, name, email). The LOAN entity shape displays at least two of its required attributes (loan_id, book_id, member_id, loan_date).

task_completion.description: Connections are drawn between the required entities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are visible connector lines linking the BOOK shape to the AUTHOR shape, the BOOK shape to the LOAN shape, and the MEMBER shape to the LOAN shape.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as library_er_diagram.drawio on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager window, or the draw.io application title bar shows the file named 'library_er_diagram.drawio' located in the '/home/ga/Desktop' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io application open with shapes being manipulated on the canvas, rather than a text editor or terminal window writing XML directly.

integrity.description: The connections between entities are actual draw.io connector lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The lines between entities should snap to the connection points of the entity boxes, typical of draw.io's built-in connector tools, rather than being disconnected floating line segments.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the diagram rather than loading a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progressive screenshots show the step-by-step addition of entities, attributes, and connections on an initially blank canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must contain exactly 4 entities: BOOK, AUTHOR, MEMBER, and LOAN. Each entity must have at least 2 visible attributes (e.g., BOOK needs 2 of: book_id, title, isbn). There must be at least 3 connector lines establishing relationships: BOOK-AUTHOR, BOOK-LOAN, and MEMBER-LOAN. The final file must be named 'library_er_diagram.drawio' and saved to the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop).
